purpose: Recommend gate families from resource classification output without freezing BLXST into hardcoded resource-to-gate mappings.

gate_families.authorized_context_gate: Verify task origin, mode, scope, and authorization context.
gate_families.provenance_gate: Require source_type, evidence/user submission reference, review_status, and non-fabrication checks for real-world content.
gate_families.registry_update_gate: Require registry or routing-rule update before handling unknown/new resources.
gate_families.review_required_gate: Require human or higher-level system review when confidence, scope, provenance, or resource boundary is unclear.
gate_families.source_change_gate: For Pages/static/source changes; must remain separate from deploy.
gate_families.data_mutation_gate: For D1/KV/structured data writes; must validate schema, provenance, and rollback/audit path.
gate_families.media_mutation_gate: For R2/media writes; must validate media origin, metadata, and review status.
gate_families.controlled_deploy_gate: For production publish; push is not deploy; use controlled Pages deploy only.
gate_families.outcome_record_gate: Record results and evidence after any applied change.

seed_hints_non_exhaustive.note: Seed hint only. Use registry/routing rules as source of truth.
Seed hint only. Exact DB/table policy must come from registry/routing rules.
Seed hint only. Exact bucket/path policy must come from registry/routing rules.
Seed hint only. Worker/API changes are high risk by default.
Seed hint only. Production deploy requires explicit controlled deploy phase.
Unknown/new resources must not be ignored or falsely classified.

hard_rules: Do not treat seed hints as a complete resource list.
Do not hardcode all future D1/R2/KV/Worker/Page structures into classifier code.
Unknown resources must produce registry_update_required or review_required.
Real-world content requires provenance checks before publication.
